task_completion.description: Create a new sales team named 'West Coast'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Sales Teams list or a form view shows a newly created sales team with the exact name 'West Coast'.

task_completion.description: Reassign the 'Golden Gate Software Upgrade' opportunity to the West Coast team
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opportunity 'Golden Gate Software Upgrade' is visible in the CRM/Sales app with its 'Sales Team' field set to 'West Coast' (can be seen in list view, kanban view, or form view).

task_completion.description: Reassign the 'SoCal Surf Shop Franchise' opportunity to the West Coast team
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opportunity 'SoCal Surf Shop Franchise' is visible in the CRM/Sales app with its 'Sales Team' field set to 'West Coast'.

task_completion.description: Reassign the 'Napa Valley Logistics' opportunity to the West Coast team
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opportunity 'Napa Valley Logistics' is visible in the CRM/Sales app with its 'Sales Team' field set to 'West Coast'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Gotham Trading Platform' opportunity is NOT moved to the West Coast team
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opportunity 'Gotham Trading Platform' retains its original sales team and is NOT assigned to 'West Coast'. It should not appear if the view is filtered by the 'West Coast' team.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Austin Warehouse Automation' opportunity is NOT moved to the West Coast team
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opportunity 'Austin Warehouse Automation' retains its original sales team and is NOT assigned to 'West Coast'. It should not appear if the view is filtered by the 'West Coast' team.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual CRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes to sales teams and opportunities are made within the Odoo CRM/Sales modules, not typed into a text editor, notes app, or search bar.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's 'Inspect Element' or Developer Tools being open to temporarily modify the DOM text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Sales Team: 'West Coast'. Target State: California (CA). Opportunities that MUST be assigned to 'West Coast': 'Golden Gate Software Upgrade', 'SoCal Surf Shop Franchise', and 'Napa Valley Logistics'. Opportunities that MUST NOT be assigned to 'West Coast' (control leads): 'Gotham Trading Platform' (New York) and 'Austin Warehouse Automation' (Texas).
